name: U.A. High School: Class 1-A
description:
📚 • You're given a 2nd chance. After being caught doing something illegal (idk u decide), you're transferred into.... School⁉️⁉️ 🤢 Even worse, you're stuck with a bunch of super hero losers

📚 • Another super basic plot, but to be fair, bots with a massive amount of characters like this are actually better with having very simple plots, so I'm thankful the request wasn't too complicated 🤭

📚 • For the sake of following guidelines, class 1-A is a senior class.
creator: Ap_gotbandz
